raw_consumer_statement:
Dear American Express Dispute Resolution Team, I am writing to formally request a full refund of {$140.00} from XXXX, also known as XXXX, due to an incident that left my family stranded in XXXX, New Jersey on XX/XX/XXXX in which they did not deliver on the full services that I purchased. This situation forced us to arrange alternative transportation later in the day and resulted in missed important events. 
At approximately XXXX AM on the date in question, my family attempted to board the XXXX AM bus as scheduled. However, the bus driver refused to allow us entry. His actions were highly distressing and appeared discriminatory, as he noticed we were XXXX and ignored our repeated requests to board. Despite our efforts to explain the situation, he simply mouthed no through the door, claiming it was already XXXX AM, which was not the case. The bus departed at XXXX AM, as evidenced by time-stamped photos and videos and pictures I have of the incident. 
Immediately following this incident, I contacted XXXX XXXX customer service line. They apologized and advised me to submit a refund request through their website, which I completed promptly that same day. After providing all requested information, I was informed that an investigation would take 6-8 weeks. On XX/XX/XXXX, I received an email from XXXX 's executive customer support requesting additional information, which I provided. Since then, I have received no further communication or resolution. 
Recently, I learned from American Express that XXXX claims I did not attempt to contact them regarding this matter. This is categorically false. I have provided time-stamped email communications that clearly demonstrate my efforts to resolve this situation. Greyhounds denial of my claim is both dishonest and unacceptable. 
As a loyal American Express cardholder since XXXX with a sterling record, I am turning to you for assistance in rectifying this matter. I trust that you will advocate on my behalf to ensure this unresolved issue is appropriately addressed. I am happy to provide any additional supporting documentation you require. 
Thank you for your attention and support.
